title: Integration & QA Engineer, HEART4Victims
subtitle: VCPMS, a cloud case-management platform helping state agencies process crime-victim compensation claims.
impact: Why it matters: I own the integration test suites for a real, multi-tenant production system. Playwright E2E across Angular and .NET Core, covering OAuth/JWT auth, document management, and payment integrations, with automated API regression in Azure DevOps CI/CD.
details: Developed and maintained integration test suites using Playwright to validate API integrations across multi-tenant Angular applications and .NET Core backend services.
Implemented end-to-end testing for critical workflows: authentication (OAuth/JWT), document management, and payment system integrations.
Created automated regression testing for RESTful API endpoints, ensuring data integrity across system integrations.
Used Azure DevOps Pipelines for CI/CD automated testing and release management.

title: Agricola Online
subtitle: Real-time multiplayer adaptation of the board game Agricola.
impact: Why it matters: a turn-based, room-per-match game is a genuine reason to reach for distributed systems. Go goroutines per game loop, WebSocket state sync, and Kubernetes that scales game servers with demand.
details: Go game server: one goroutine-driven game loop per room, WebSocket fan-out for live turn updates.
Rules engine modelled as a state machine with pure transition functions, making it testable and snapshot-friendly.
Redis-backed room state so any pod can serve a room and reconnections survive restarts.
Kubernetes HPA scales game-server pods with player demand. Full spec in docs/agricola-architecture.md.

title: Job Dashboard
subtitle: Self-hosted job tracker: Gmail in, Claude classification, native macOS widget out.
impact: Why it matters: a complete system with an LLM in the classification loop, structured output, an event-sourced data model, OAuth integrations, a scheduler, and a native widget. Proof I can ship end-to-end.
details: Python pipeline (launchd, every 3h) classifies labelled Gmail with Claude using structured output.
Event-sourced SQLite model: never regresses a stage, auto-derives 'ghosted' after 21 quiet days.
MCP server to add/move applications from Claude Desktop; interviews pushed to Google Calendar.
Native SwiftUI macOS app plus extra-large desktop widget with live pipeline stats.

title: Full-Stack Intern, Poseidon Aerospace
subtitle: Startup building unmanned seaplane drones for long-range maritime cargo and defense.
impact: Why it matters: shipped real flight-software infrastructure, including RESTful APIs integrating flight telemetry with central databases, Python telemetry monitoring and automation on Linux (Grafana, Azure Monitor), and Docker plus CI/CD for UAV dashboards.
details: Built RESTful APIs to integrate flight telemetry systems with centralized databases (Node.js, Express, SQL).
Developed Python scripts for telemetry monitoring and automation in Linux environments (Grafana, Azure Monitor).
Contributed to containerized deployments (Docker) and CI/CD workflows for UAV flight dashboards and APIs.

title: Full-Stack Intern, HEART4Victims
subtitle: Earlier internship on the VCPMS claim-management platform.
impact: Why it matters: built a step-by-step online claim form with validation (fewer incomplete applications), payment APIs to the state's finance software (removing double entry), a secure SignalR messaging feature, and AWS environments via Terraform IaC.
details: Built an online claim application form that guided users step by step and validated input, resulting in fewer incomplete applications (ASP.NET Core, Angular, SQL).
Helped develop APIs to send approved payments to the state's finance software, removing double entry (ASP.NET Core, SQL).
Added a secure messaging feature for claimants and staff (SignalR).
Provisioned and maintained AWS environments using Terraform with Infrastructure-as-Code practices.

title: B.S. Computer Science, UC Santa Cruz
subtitle: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science. GPA 3.5.
impact: Foundations in algorithms, systems, and software engineering, earned alongside three concurrent industry roles.
details: B.S. in Computer Science, GPA 3.5.
Held three concurrent industry roles (two internships plus a QA engineering role) while completing the degree.
